adrs.title: A new app is a clean scaffold instance whose ROOT serves the app
adrs.context_md: Cloning-and-pivoting an existing project drags the donor's landing page, branding, and cruft onto the new root (this pattern has shipped apps with the wrong front door).
adrs.decision_md: Start every app from the scaffold via init.sh: root serves the app, hub at /hub, born-safe, born-governed.
adrs.consequences_md: The deployed root URL always presents the app; no donor cruft; every project starts governed.

adrs.title: PROJECT/ is the Project Plane: the canonical content-agnostic management framework
adrs.context_md: Projects accumulated decisions, research, gaps, verification, and audit history in ad-hoc files; multi-agent campaigns improvised their own protocol, registers, and gates mid-flight, and governance lagged the work layer.
adrs.decision_md: Every project is born with the Project Plane (PROJECT/README.md = the spec): hub ledger canonical for trackable entities; DOCTRINE/CHARTER/HANDOFF spine; ADR + research + registers + audit + verify + runs + worklogs + ops; pm/PROTOCOL.md as the leader/worker/verifier campaign law.
adrs.consequences_md: One source of truth per fact class; channels crystallize into canon same-session; ships gate on re-derived green; any cold agent resumes from HANDOFF.md alone.

tasks.title: Build the app: mount the hub per adapters/django/MOUNTING.md, implement the first feature, then deploy via your deploy contract
Adopt the Project Plane: fill CHARTER.md + HANDOFF.md, read DOCTRINE.md, seed TRUTH-MATRIX for your first surface
